info.title: Go API Dojo

put.summary: Replace all category assignments for a course
Replace all tag assignments for a course

Get the login history of the authenticated user

put.summary: Change the password of a user

post.description: In bearer/dual mode, returns a token pair in JSON. In cookie-only mode, sets HttpOnly auth cookies and returns {"authenticated":true}.
Revokes server-side refresh sessions. In cookie/dual mode, also clears auth cookies on the client.
post.summary: Revoke all active refresh tokens for the current user
Resend the OTP code by email
Validate a 2FA OTP code and return a token pair
Set a new password using a reset token

post.description: Accepts refresh token from JSON body or, in cookie/dual mode, from the refresh cookie. In cookie-only mode, rotated tokens are returned via HttpOnly cookies.
post.summary: Rotate a refresh token and return a new token pair

200.description: Cookie mode: tokens are set in HttpOnly cookies

post.summary: Verify an email address using the token sent by email

get.summary: Check the health of the API and its dependencies

vat_number.description: Sensitive — visible only to the owner
